meta.description: Local fixture for news_event_market_impact card type — 5 valid news events covering ETF, regulation, security, exchange, macro; 2 invalid/blocked events.

signal.headline: BlackRock Bitcoin ETF Sees $420M Inflows, Largest Single-Day Since March
signal.body: BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) recorded $420 million in net inflows on Wednesday, marking the largest single-day inflow since March 2026. The surge comes as Bitcoin briefly reclaimed the $72,000 level, with total spot Bitcoin ETF net inflows reaching $680 million across all issuers. Analysts note that institutional demand remains robust despite recent macro uncertainty.
signal.risk_tags: ETF, 机构, 资金流向
signal.impact_scope: BTC 及 BTC 生态相关资产

signal.headline: EU Parliament Passes Stricter DeFi KYC Rules, Effective January 2027
signal.body: The European Parliament voted 487-102 to pass stricter new regulations requiring decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols to implement know-your-customer (KYC) procedures for transactions above €1,000. The rules, effective January 2027, will affect major DeFi platforms operating in or serving EU residents. Industry groups warn the rules could push DeFi innovation offshore, while regulators argue they are necessary to combat money laundering. The crypto market reacted negatively, with ETH and DeFi tokens declining on the news.
signal.risk_tags: 监管, DeFi, KYC, 欧盟
signal.impact_scope: ETH 及 DeFi 代币 (AAVE, UNI, MKR 等)

signal.headline: Arbitrum Bridge Exploit Drains $47M in ETH and USDC — Team Confirms Investigation
signal.body: On-chain security firm PeckShield detected an unusual outflow of approximately $47 million in ETH and USDC from the Arbitrum bridge contract. The Arbitrum team confirmed they are investigating the incident and have paused the bridge temporarily. Preliminary analysis suggests a compromised validator key. ARB token dropped 12% within 30 minutes of the news breaking.
signal.risk_tags: 安全, 漏洞, 跨链桥, ARB
signal.impact_scope: ARB 及 L2 生态代币

signal.headline: Binance to List Hyperliquid (HYPE) with USDT Perpetual Contracts at 14:00 UTC
signal.body: Binance announced it will list Hyperliquid (HYPE) and open trading for HYPE/USDT perpetual contracts at 14:00 UTC today. The exchange noted that HYPE perpetuals will support up to 50x leverage. HYPE, the native token of the Hyperliquid L1, has gained significant traction as a leading decentralized perpetuals exchange, processing over $3B in daily volume.
signal.risk_tags: 上币, Binance, HYPE, 合约
signal.impact_scope: HYPE 及 DEX 板块代币

signal.headline: Fed Signals Rate Cut Likely in July as Inflation Cools to 2.4% — DXY Drops Below 100
signal.body: Federal Reserve Chair indicated that a rate cut is 'likely appropriate' at the July FOMC meeting after the latest CPI data showed inflation cooling to 2.4% year-over-year. The US Dollar Index (DXY) fell below the 100 level for the first time since September 2024. Risk assets rallied broadly, with crypto markets showing particular strength — BTC rose 4.2% and ETH gained 5.8% within hours of the statement.
signal.risk_tags: 宏观, 利率, 美联储, DXY, 流动性
signal.impact_scope: 全市场 (BTC, ETH 领涨, 山寨币跟随)

signal.headline: Local Meetup Group Plans Blockchain Workshop Next Month
signal.body: A local blockchain enthusiast group announced they will host a workshop on smart contract development next month. The event is free and open to the public.

news_events.block_reason: 已被市场完全定价 + 交易相关性为极低

signal.headline: Solana Foundation Publishes Quarterly Ecosystem Report — No Material Updates
signal.body: The Solana Foundation published its Q1 2026 ecosystem report detailing developer activity, transaction volumes, and grant recipients. The report contained no material updates or forward-looking statements beyond previously known information. SOL price showed no reaction.
